query:
-- Check media assignments
SELECT id, filename, flightId 
FROM media 
WHERE projectId = 1 AND flightId = 180001
ORDER BY id;

-- Check all media for comparison
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_media, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN flightId = 180001 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flight_180001,
       SUM(CASE WHEN flightId = 180002 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flight_180002,
       SUM(CASE WHEN flightId = 180003 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flight_180003,
       SUM(CASE WHEN flightId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unassigned
FROM media 
WHERE projectId = 1;

SELECT id, filename, flightId 
FROM media

-- Check all media for comparison
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_media, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN flightId = 180001 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flight_180001,
       SUM(CASE WHEN flightId = 180002 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flight_180002,
       SUM(CASE WHEN flightId = 180003 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flight_180003,
       SUM(CASE WHEN flightId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unassigned
FROM media 
WHERE projectId = 1;
